info.english_meaning: to speak to meditate to mutter to speak nonsense
info.hindI_arTa: bolanA bakanA japa karanA mana meM bolanA

upasargachandrika.example_text: 'tasmin pure janapade saYjalpo'BUcca saNGaSaH' saYjalpaH=sADAraRo jalpaH samudito jalpaH
'saMgatA munayaH sarve saMjajalpuraTo miTaH' (rA 17421) samSabdo'DikaH miTa ityanena gatArTatvAt saMbaBAzire samUdire
'vijalpaH pralApaH mAtsaryagarBA gIH asO tvA vijalpati' (kO0 a0 111160)
'ye kzantAro nABijalpanti cAnyAn' (BA0 anu0 10231) apavadanti nindantItyarTaH
'so'yamityaBisambanDAd rUpamekIkftaM yadA SabdasyArTena taM SabdamaBijalpaM pracakzate' (vA0 pa0 2128).. nigadavyAKyAtam
'anAhUtopasfzwAnAmanAhUtopajalpinAm ye lokAstAnhataH karRa mayA tvaM pratipatsyase' (BA0 Adi0 13618)
